creator: wblock@wonkity.com
text:
Add US Robotics USR5422 USB WLAN product ID to usbdevs and if_upgt driver: http://forums.freebsd.org/showthread.php?t=14472

Fix: Apply patch which adds product ID to sys/dev/usb/usbdevs and vendor and product to sys/dev/usb/wlan/if_upgt.c.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Attach USR5422 USB WLAN device and note that it is not detected by upgt.
